rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for all AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Component ports referenced in contracts must be declared in the component type scope
AGREE expressions must match the actual AADL data types of referenced ports
Avoid encoding AADL properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq variable : type = expression pattern for range comparisons
Do not reference opaque Boolean or enumeration ports in range expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically available as AGREE variables
